what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata stub that records a design-source image asset (company-info/p-12.jpg) in the channel-memory store, giving it an id, address, channel, blob pointer, MIME type, authorship, timestamp, and an empty link list.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id company-info/p-12 and address image://design-source/company-info/p-12
The asset is assigned to channel design-source and path company-info/p-12
Blob reference is blob://b2:14a5938fe33a4fa39d259ce7a932509a with mime image/jpeg
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body text labels the entry as 'SOURCE design ground-truth — company-info/p-12.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are 0 despite being an image/jpeg record
Explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' classification in the body
Blob URI is present but no links to other artifacts
Empty links array leaves the asset isolated in the ledger
conventions: Follows the ledger metadata format with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, source, author_session, created, and links
Uses URI schemes image:// and blob:// for addressing and storage
Breaks the usual image metadata convention by omitting/non-populating width and height
concerns: Recorded image dimensions are 0, which is likely incorrect or unpopulated
No links/relationships connect this asset to other design artifacts
No alt text, caption, or content description is provided
Provenance is limited to an opaque author_session id
notes: A metadata stub for a design-source JPEG whose dimensions are not recorded and whose relationship graph is empty.
questions: Why are width and height 0 for an image asset?
What visual content does company-info/p-12.jpg contain?
Why does the asset have no links to related design artifacts?
What is the scope and role of author_session ch-3mpkjg3r?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated as a design ground-truth source; the file actually stores ledger metadata for the image rather than the image itself, and it lacks populated dimensions or relationships.
intention_signals: Register and preserve a design-source image as a ground-truth asset within a channel-memory ledger, associating it with a blob, authorship session, and creation time.
novelty: Explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' classification in the body and zero recorded dimensions for an image asset.
contribution: Provides a stable ledger identity, blob pointer, authorship session, timestamp, and source classification for a design image asset.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel-memory metadata ledger entry for the design-source JPEG image company-info/p-12, referencing blob b2:14a5938fe33a4fa39d259ce7a932509a with zero recorded dimensions and no links.
intention_for_embedding: It was intended to catalog a design ground-truth image asset under the design-source channel with provenance and a persistent blob reference.
